changes_after_pilot: Frozen the simulator parameters used in the pilot.
Set material thresholds from the pilot scale before opening seeds 6201-6296.
Expanded the random-sparse null tolerance to 0.08 collision units because independent permutations varied by roughly 0.03 in the excluded pilot; the null still requires p > 0.10.
No Ulam-favoring mechanism or outcome-dependent schedule rule was added.
purpose: Check scale, deterministic matching, and whether the synthetic timing mechanism had nonzero dynamic range before freezing fresh analysis seeds.
